name: Navigator Global Investments Limited
analysis: NGI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 24% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$2.5500, stop A$2.2869, target A$3.0900 (2.05:1) — then trail it.
